scripts.dev: concurrently --names auth,session,order,exit,dashboard,gateway,frontend --prefix-colors cyan,green,blue,magenta,yellow,red,white "npm run dev --prefix auth-service" "npm run dev --prefix session-service" "npm run dev --prefix order-service" "npm run dev --prefix exit-service" "npm run dev --prefix dashboard-service" "npm run dev --prefix gateway-service" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
